"'''Cantina Raid'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Erik A. Dewey]]. It depicts a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] raid on the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]], following the escape of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Game-stub}}
